category_sources: Official Ignite docs and GitHub repository describe Ignite CLI for constructing Cosmos SDK proof-of-stake blockchains.
source_facts.description says Ignite CLI builds, launches, and maintains crypto applications.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title uses IGNITE CLI Docs.
source_facts.name is ignite and source_facts.description identifies it as Ignite CLI.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official Ignite CLI documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ignite/cli, so repo discovery was skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes constructing proof-of-stake blockchains rooted in Cosmos SDK.
source_facts.description says it builds crypto applications with Ignite CLI.
